requirement_topic.en: EVSE Safety Evidence — UL 2594 / UL 2202 Direction and Hurricane-prone Island Installation
requirement_topic.zh: EVSE安全证据——UL 2594 / UL 2202方向及飓风多发环境安装
requirement_topic.zht: EVSE安全證據——UL 2594 / UL 2202方向及颶風多發環境安裝

summary.en: For FSM, EVSE safety evidence should follow the US-direction framework expected for a 120/240 V 60 Hz island model. AC EVSE is commonly evaluated to UL 2594 and DC equipment to UL 2202. Installation details should align with local electrical code context, project specification, and state utility requirements. In this tropical cyclone environment, outdoor equipment should also address enclosure ingress protection, corrosion, surge, anchoring, wind exposure, heat, humidity, and post-storm serviceability.
summary.zh: FSM中，EVSE安全证据应遵循120/240 V 60 Hz海岛模型下的美国方向框架。交流EVSE通常按UL 2594评估，直流充电设备按UL 2202评估。安装细节应符合当地电气规范、项目规范和州公用事业要求。FSM属热带飓风环境，户外设备还应覆盖外壳防护、腐蚀、防浪涌、锚固、抗风、热湿及暴风后可维护性。
summary.zht: FSM中，EVSE安全證據應遵循120/240 V 60 Hz海島模型下之美國方向框架。交流EVSE通常依UL 2594評估，直流充電設備依UL 2202評估。安裝細節應符合當地電氣規範、項目規範和州公共事業要求。FSM屬熱帶颶風環境，戶外設備還應覆蓋外殼防護、腐蝕、浪湧、錨固、抗風、熱濕以及暴風後可維護性。

standards_or_laws: UL 2202 — Electric Vehicle Charging System Equipment
UL 2231 series — personnel protection systems for EV supply circuits where specified
IEC 61851 series — EV conductive charging system reference where accepted by project
Local electrical installation, utility, and safety requirements

summary.en: Chinese comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging, plus communication and connector standards. This supports engineering review in China but does not automatically satisfy UL 2594, UL 2202, FSM state utility safety context, or island-specific environmental requirements.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线是GB/T 18487.1-2023及相关通信与接口标准，仅支持中国工程审查，不能自动满足FSM的UL 2594、UL 2202、州公用事业安全要求或岛屿环境要求。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023及相關通訊與接口標準，僅支持中國工程審查，不能自動滿足FSM的UL 2594、UL 2202、州公共事業安全要求或島嶼環境要求。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare UL-direction safety documentation or a clause-level gap matrix, protective-device ratings for 120/240 V 60 Hz service, ground-fault and personnel-protection evidence, enclosure and corrosion evidence, surge protection, thermal derating for humid outdoor conditions, installation manuals for local electricians, and project-owner/state utility review documentation. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not an FSM safety-acceptance package.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备UL方向安全文件或分条差距矩阵、适用于120/240 V 60 Hz供电的保护器件等级、接地故障与人员保护证据、外壳与腐蚀证据、浪涌、防止高湿户外工况热降额、面向当地电工的安装说明、以及项目业主/州公用事业审查文件。单独GB/T 18487报告不足以构成FSM安全验收文件。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備UL方向安全文件或條目式差距矩陣、適用120/240 V 60 Hz供電之保護器件等級、接地故障與人員保護證據、外殼與腐蝕證據、浪湧、防濕戶外工況熱降額、面向當地電工之安裝說明，以及項目業主/州公共事業審查文件。單獨GB/T 18487報告不足以構成FSM安全驗收文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but safety-critical — UL-direction EVSE evidence, local electrical acceptance, and cyclone-ready outdoor suitability should be confirmed with DRD, state utility, and project owner
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 is not a direct substitute for UL 2594 / UL 2202 or FSM state-utility acceptance

source.publisher: Department of Resources and Development (DRD), Federated States of Micronesia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a domestic engineering baseline only. For FSM-facing documentation, include UL-direction EVSE safety evidence, 120/240 V 60 Hz protective-device review, outdoor enclosure and corrosion evidence, surge protection, and local installation acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将GB/T 18487.1-2023仅作为中国国内工程基线。面向FSM文件应包括UL方向EVSE安全证据、120/240 V 60 Hz保护器件复核、户外外壳与腐蚀证据、浪涌保护以及当地安装验收。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將GB/T 18487.1-2023僅作為中國國內工程基線。面向FSM文件應包含UL方向EVSE安全證據、120/240 V 60 Hz保護器件複核、戶外外殼與腐蝕證據、浪湧防護及當地安裝驗收。
